title: erigeron tuxtlensis
intro: Erigeron tuxtlensis, also known as the Tuxtlas fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron tuxtlensis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Erigeron tuxtlensis often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or other topical applications.
